summary.title: Result
summary.query_first: Please search for a parcel first.
summary.disclaimer: This application is for demo purposes only. Data is sourced from the public services of the General Directorate of Land Registry and Cadastre and may not be used for official or commercial purposes. Coordinate accuracy is limited; consult a licensed surveying engineer for on-site staking.

weather.title: Weather
weather.loading: Fetching the 7-day forecast and 30-year climate normals…

soil.title: Soil & Topography
soil.loading: Fetching soil/slope data from SoilGrids and the elevation model…

footer.open_report_hint: Activates once weather and soil data have arrived.

report.title: AI Field Report
report.empty_response: The agent returned an empty response.
report.login_required: Please log in for the AI report.
report.model_select_title: OpenRouter model used for the report and chat
report.ask_question: Ask a question about the report (switch to Chat)
report.rent_out_cta: I want to rent out my field

pdf.subtitle: AI-Powered Field Analysis Report
pdf.disclaimer: This report was generated by the "Ne Yetişir?" demo application using AI, based on public TKGM, Open-Meteo, and ISRIC SoilGrids data. It contains estimated values; it may not be used for official or commercial purposes. Consult a lab soil test and an agricultural engineer for definitive results.

chat.hint: The report and collected data are in the chat's memory; you can ask the AI follow-up questions.
chat.example: The report and data are in the chat's memory. Example question: "Would a drip irrigation investment make sense for this parcel?"

welcome.title: Want to become one of our farmers?
welcome.desc: Thousands of fields waiting to be planted are out there. Explore now and start earning!
welcome.cta_list: Want to rent out your field?

kiralama.title: Fill in the details to rent out your field
kiralama.subtitle: Your application will be published on the public listings page after our team reviews it.
kiralama.required_note: Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required.
kiralama.description_placeholder: Anything you'd like to add about the field (road access, rent expectations, crop history, etc.)
kiralama.done_desc: Your field will be published on the public listings page after our team reviews it. Interested parties will contact you using the details you provided.

ciftci.title: Tell us about yourself to join us
ciftci.subtitle: Share your details; our team will review your application and get in touch.
ciftci.experience_desc_placeholder: What crops have you grown, how many decares have you worked, your past experience, etc.
ciftci.done_desc: Your application will be reviewed by our team and we'll contact you using the details you provided. Thanks for your interest!

tarlayardim.title: Ask for help planting your field
tarlayardim.subtitle: Do you have a field but need help planting or working it? Leave your details and our team will match you with the right farmer and services.
tarlayardim.need_legend: What kind of help do you need?
tarlayardim.description_placeholder: What kind of support are you looking for? (soil preparation, planting, irrigation, crop selection, harvest, machinery/equipment, etc.)
tarlayardim.done_desc: Your field planting/working request has reached our team. We'll contact you as soon as possible using the details you provided.

kiralik.title: Fields for Rent
kiralik.empty_title: No listings have been published yet.
kiralik.empty_hint: Be the first to list one!
kiralik.done_desc: Our team will review your application and contact you using the details you provided.
kiralik.no_listings: There are no published listings right now.
